name: Barley Stuffed Green Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms and onions; cook until the onions are browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in barley, parsley, thyme, pepper, and shredded cheese. Set aside.
4. Rinse bell peppers. Remove tops and discard seeds and pith. If needed, make a small cut at the bottom for stability.
5. Spoon half of the mixture into each pepper.
6. Stand peppers upright in a baking dish large enough to hold them. Pour marinara sauce over the peppers.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until peppers are tender.
